/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	ArticleId int NOT NULL,
	ProductionPlace1_Id int NULL,
	ProductionPlace2_Id int NULL,
	ProductionPlace3_Id int NULL,
	ProductionPlace1_Name nvarchar(150) NULL,
	ProductionPlace2_Name nvarchar(150) NULL,
	ProductionPlace3_Name nvarchar(150) NULL,
	AlternativeProductionPlace bit NULL,
	CreateUserId int NULL,
	CreateTime datetime NULL,
	UpdateUserId int NULL,
	UpdateTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF___BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension_UpdateTime DEFAULT getdate() FOR UpdateTime
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__BSD_ArtikelProductionExtension', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
